channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Imposes New Tariffs to Sidestep Supreme Court Ruling
item.description: The president signed an executive order implementing 10 percent global tariffs after calling the justices who struck down his signature trade policy a...

item.title: The Supreme Court’s Tariff Ruling Won’t Bring Car Prices Back to Earth
item.description: Despite Friday’s SCOTUS ruling, many tariffs affecting the auto industry will remain. So will the other dynamics that have led to today’s historically...

item.title: After the 2026 Winter Olympics, Figure Skating Will Never Be the Same
item.description: From disappointments to scandals to Madison Chock and Evan Bates’ silver medal, figure skating brought some of the biggest surprises of the Milano Cor...

item.title: iRestore Elite Laser Hair Growth System Review: Surprisingly Effective
item.description: After just two months, my husband saw enough hair regrowth that his college friends commented on it.

item.title: ‘Narco-Submarine’ Carrying 4 Tons of Cocaine Captured by Mexico's Navy
item.description: Following increased surveillance and patrols of routes used by transnational drug-trafficking networks, Mexican authorities have seized approximately ...

item.title: India’s Sarvam launches Indus AI chat app as competition heats up
item.description: Sarvam's Indus chat app is currently available in beta.

item.title: Apple’s iOS 26.4 arrives in public beta with AI music playlists, video podcasts, and more
item.description: Several updates are introduced in iOS 26.4, including an AI-powered playlist-generation feature in Apple Music, support for video content in the Podca...

item.title: Anthropic-funded group backs candidate attacked by rival AI super PAC
item.description: Dueling pro-AI PACs have centered around backing or targeting one New York congressional bid: Alex Bores, whose RAISE Act requires AI developers to di...

item.title: Remember HQ? ‘Quiz Daddy’ Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a daily mobile game show
item.description: The former HQ host Scott Rogowsky is back with TextSavvy, a live mobile game show that he's building on his own terms.

item.title: The creator economy’s ad revenue problem and India’s AI ambitions
item.description: The creator economy is evolving fast, and ad revenue alone isn’t cutting it anymore. YouTubers are launching product lines, acquiring startups, and bu...
